category_title: Marginalized and struggling urban students with histories of truancy and initial disengagement
scenario_title: Essay Writing and Academic Task Resistance
minimal_context: The student is asked to write a history essay using their textbook and paper during a 50-minute lesson.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: For today's 50-minute lesson, please use your textbook and paper to write an essay about the chapter we just read.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm just trying to get in and get out so I can graduate. I hated learning about history because of all the dates.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You still need to complete the assignment. Please open your textbook.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I never attended social studies class at my other school. Like I didn't even want to look at the book.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just look at the essay prompt and try to write something down on your paper.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes the paper away) I look at it and I'm like, I can't write this. I'm not doing this.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: For today's 50-minute lesson, please use your textbook and paper to write an essay about the chapter we just read.

STUDENT: I'm just trying to get in and get out so I can graduate. I hated learning about history because of all the dates.

TUTOR: You still need to complete the assignment. Please open your textbook.

STUDENT: I never attended social studies class at my other school. Like I didn't even want to look at the book.

TUTOR: Just look at the essay prompt and try to write something down on your paper.

STUDENT: (Pushes the paper away) I look at it and I'm like, I can't write this. I'm not doing this.

task.learning_goal: gain such skills and achieve these results without drill-and-kill test preparation

challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: unwilling to participate in class activities, I would look at it and be like, I can't write this
related_quotes: I would look at it and be like, I can't write this.
I hated learning about history because of all the dates.
Like I didn't even want to look at the book

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: trying to 'get in and get out', doing only what they needed to do to graduate
behavior_patterns.internal_state: prior negative experiences in the classroom
